rulings.Case Title: EST. OF DER HONG
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Terminate Receivership
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The Court may inquire whether the receiver's full accounting is necessary as the parties' written waiver of account and whether the receiver has fulfilled all the duties imposed by the Court order dated 11/10/2021 - Order Accepting Resignation of Executor and Appointing Receiver [CCP sec. 564-570] PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE PICHOTTO PROPERTY TRUST DATED DECEMBER 24,1993
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Accounting, Demand For Distribution, For Breach Of Trust, Return Of Trust Property, Financial Elder Abuse; Removal And Appointment Of Independednt Trustee; Removal And Appointment Of Independent Trustee, Imposition Of A Constructive Trust
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required, despite the following issues (see tentative ruling for 06/05/2024 hearing) that remain unaddressed: 1) No proposed order has been received or lodged. Note: As of 07/01/2024, a copy of the proposed order must be served in a contested matter. A proof of service must be filed. See LRSF 14.7(A)(4). 2) A copy of the remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(C)(6) must be attached to and served with the notice of hearing form at least 30 days before the hearing. 3) Please provide a copy of letters issued to John Begg as personal representative of the estate of Shawn Crane. If no personal representative has been appointed, the name and address of each heir and devisee must be provided by a verified allegation, and notice must be given to each of them. See Probate Code section 17203(c)(1). 4) No summons has been issued and served as to the elder abuse cause of action. 5) No declaration required by CCP section 377.32 has been filed by the petitioner to whom the right to prosecute Leona May's elder abuse cause of action is alleged to have passed under Welfare & Institutions Code section 15657.3(d). 6) If there is no personal representative of the estate of Shawn Crane, each devisee must be served in the manner required by section 851(a)(2) as to relief under section 850 against Shawn Crane's estate. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE TRUST OF DAVID BROOK MCLAUGHLIN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Appoint Trustee
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 9/16/24. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) No proposed order has been lodged or received by the assigned examiner. [LRSF 14.7 A. and 14.59 E.] (2) Notice must have attached to it the procedures for how to make a remote appearance by Zoom and CourtCall, as well as remote public access, as set out at https://sf.courts.ca.gov/divisions/probate-court. [LRSF 14.1 C.6.] (3) All petitions involving a trust must state the names and last known addresses of all vested or contingent beneficiaries. [CRC 7.902.] Unless an exception applies, such beneficiaries must either receive or waive notice. (4) Other than the copy of the trust, there does not appear to be any other exhibits attached to the petition, supporting the allegations, such as receipts or deeds or death certificates, etc. Please provide a proposed order and courtesy copies of the petition and any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 9/3/24. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ALICE MARY KARAM
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
rulings.Rulings: Matter will be called to admit will. No appearance is required.
